identity.name: Y-Store Mobile Refinement
core_principles: Horizontal over Vertical: Reduce scroll fatigue with sliders.
Density with Clarity: Compact cards but high readability.
Visual Feedback: Micro-interactions for every touch.
Speed Perception: Skeleton loaders and instant transitions.

rules: High Contrast: Ensure text passes APCA checks.
No Gradients on Text: Keep text solid for readability.
Glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 dark:bg-black/80' for sticky headers/navs.

patterns.horizontal_scroll: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory scrollbar-hide -mx-4 px-4 gap-4
patterns.bottom_sheet: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-background rounded-t-xl shadow-lg transform transition-transform

structure: Container: aspect-[3/5] or aspect-[2/3] flex flex-col bg-card rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-border/50 shadow-sm
Content: p-2 flex flex-col gap-1 flex-1
Action: Absolute 'Add' button or small icon button bottom-right

CategorySlider.item: flex flex-col items-center gap-2 w-16 shrink-0
CategorySlider.icon: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-secondary flex items-center justify-center text-xl
CategorySlider.label: text-xs text-center font-medium truncate w-full

SectionHeader.title: text-lg font-bold
SectionHeader.action: text-sm text-primary font-medium flex items-center gap-1

BottomNavigation.structure: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur border-t h-16 flex items-center justify-around z-50 safe-area-bottom
BottomNavigation.item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground aria-[current=page]:text-primary

HeroBanner.structure: w-full aspect-[4/3] or aspect-[16/9] rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative

visual_enhancers.rounded: rounded-lg or rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons

universal_guidelines: Do not break desktop functionality. Use 'md:hidden' for mobile-only elements and 'hidden md:block' for desktop-only.
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44x44px.
Use 'truncate' for text that might overflow on small screens.
Prefer CSS scroll-snap for sliders over heavy JS libraries where possible.
instructions_to_main_agent: Focus heavily on the 'Catalog' and 'Home' pages. Implement the horizontal sliders using the Shadcn Carousel or a simple flex container with snap classes. Redesign the Product Card to be highly compact for the mobile grid (2 columns). Add a sticky bottom navigation bar for mobile users. Ensure the header is sticky and minimal on mobile.
